originalTitle: Apple’s public betas for iOS 27 and more are out now
summary: Apple has just released public betas for iOS 27 and other major OS updates that are set to publicly launch this fall. The big new feature this year is Siri AI, the delayed AI-powered revamp to Siri. It actually works - which is big praise! - though it keeps things brief. Other betas available now […]
content: Apple has just released public betas for iOS 27 and other major OS updates that are set to publicly launch this fall. The big new feature this year is Siri AI, the delayed AI-powered revamp to Siri. It actually works — which is big praise! — though it keeps things brief. Other betas available now include iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, and macOS 27 Golden Gate. If you want to test out Apple’s upcoming updates, fair warning that you may run into issues like unexpected glitches or a battery that drains faster than you’re used to. Use your best judgment on whether you should actually install the beta or wait to install an update until it’s officially released. But if you’re willing to roll the dice and live on the edge, installing public betas gives you a chance to peek into Apple’s future. (Though I strongly recommend backing up your device before installing a beta, just in case you need to roll things back.) To join the iOS 27 public beta program, visit this page on Apple’s website and click the button to sign up. Once you’ve done that — and backed up your device, which you did, right? — open the Settings app, then go to General > Software Update. At the top of your screen, you should see a section for “Beta Updates.” Tap that, and then select the iOS 27 public beta. For other Apple products, the steps to get set up on the beta are generally similar.
chineseTitle: Apple 的 iOS 27 及更多版本的公开测试版现已发布
chineseSummary: 苹果刚刚发布了 iOS 27 的公开测试版以及其他将于今年秋季公开发布的主要操作系统更新。今年最大的新功能是 Siri AI，这是对 Siri 的延迟的人工智能改造。它确实有效——这是一个巨大的赞扬！ - 虽然它让事情变得简短。其他测试版现已推出 [...]
chineseContent: 苹果刚刚发布了 iOS 27 的公开测试版以及其他将于今年秋季公开发布的主要操作系统更新。今年最大的新功能是 Siri AI，这是对 Siri 的延迟的人工智能改造。它确实有效——这是一个巨大的赞扬！ ——尽管它让事情变得简短。目前可用的其他测试版包括 iPadOS 27、watchOS 27 和 macOS 27 Golden Gate。如果你想测试苹果即将推出的更新，请注意你可能会遇到意外故障或电池消耗速度比你习惯的更快等问题。请根据您的最佳判断来决定是否应该实际安装测试版或等到正式发布后再安装更新。但如果你愿意孤注一掷并生活在边缘，安装公开测试版可以让你有机会一睹苹果的未来。 （尽管我强烈建议在安装测试版之前备份您的设备，以防万一您需要回滚。）要加入 iOS 27 公共测试版计划，请访问 Apple 网站上的此页面，然后单击按钮进行注册。一旦你完成了这一点，并备份了你的设备，你就做到了，对吗？ — 打开“设置”应用程序，然后转到“常规”>“软件更新”。在屏幕顶部，您应该会看到“Beta 更新”部分。点击该按钮，然后选择 iOS 27 公开测试版。对于其他 Apple 产品，测试版的设置步骤通常相似。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
